arts.ttl: Barça squad named for Valencia QF
arts.sum: Szczesny; Kounde, Eric, Cubarsí, Balde; De Jong, Pedri; Raphinha, Fermín, Ferran; Lewandowski The Blaugrana play a huge Copa del Rey quarter-final against Valencia at Mestalla, and Hansi Flick has called up the following 22 players for Thursday’s game:

FC Barcelona coach Hansi Flick appeared before the press on Wednesday at the Ciutat Esportiva Joan Gamper head of Thursday's Copa del Rey quarter final against Valencia. The Valencia coach wants to see the best competitive version of his team in the quarter-final of the Copa del Rey against Barça after the La Liga thrashing at Montjuïc.

arts.ttl: Man City, Chelsea, Barcelona 'all in the running' for Crystal Palace star who could be available for a bargain fee
arts.sum: Manchester City, Chelsea and Barcelona are allegedly all interested in signing Crystal Palace defender Daniel Munoz during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Valencia – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona head to the Mestalla to face Valencia in the Copa del Rey quarter-finals this evening. Less than two weeks after a 7-1 thrashing of Valencia in La Liga, Barca take on their struggling Spanish counterparts in a cup quarter-final. Barcelona are unbeaten since the turn of the new year and are targeting more silverware […] The post Barcelona XI vs Valencia – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Why Flick has chosen Szczęsny to be Barcelona’s No. 1
arts.sum: “We have chosen ‘Tek’ precisely because of his personality, his way of doing things, his style as a goalkeeper, how he plays. Wojciech Szczęsny has taken over from Inaki Pena as Barcelona’s No. 1 goalkeeper in recent weeks despite some high-profile errors .
